text:
urn in Jupiter's house aspected by
Ven.
Jupiter, and Venus placed in 2nd to
Saturn, show that the native will get
Sat. Moon Dt. good training from a Guru. He will
attain a decent position. As Mercury
aspects his own exaltation house, he will enjoy medium financial position.
His wife will bring him some wealth. She will have ailments caused by pol
lution of blood and will have to undergo operations. In the 7th house to Venus
is Cancer in enemy camp with Mars-an enemy in it. This will result in native
living an ordinary life.
CHART 123
The native will have only me
Mer. dium education. Jupiter has Mars in
Db. Ven. Sun Jupt. the 3rd and Ketu in the 4th and so the
native will become a Veera Sanyasi
(Mars in Leo stands for bravery). Fur
ther Venus standing for comforts in
life is with Mercury in Aries next to
Mars
Rahu in Pisces. Saturn Contacts Rahu
first in his rounds. This indicates pains.
Sat. Dt. Next Saturn contacts his friend Mer
cury and Venus enabling the native to
